label: PayPal Lockout
summary: Credential lure with urgent account-verification language and risky URLs.
subject: Urgent: Verify Your Account Immediately
body:
Dear Customer,

Your account has been limited. Please verify your login immediately to avoid suspension.

Click here now:
http://192.168.1.44/login
https://bit.ly/secure-payal-check

Regards,
PayPal Support

label: Microsoft Reset
summary: Mailbox-security reset phish with sender mismatch and malicious attachment lure.
subject: Action Required: Reset your password now
body:
Dear user,

We detected unusual activity on your Microsoft 365 account. Reset your password immediately to secure your mailbox.

Review the attached html file and confirm your login now.

Verify account:
https://tinyurl.com/m365-secure-reset

Security Team

label: CEO Wire Request
summary: Executive impersonation asking finance to complete an urgent bank transfer.
subject: Need this wire sent in the next 30 minutes
body:
Hi,

I am in meetings and need you to process a confidential wire transfer immediately. Do not call me right now. Send confirmation once the payment has been completed.

Beneficiary details will follow after you reply.

Daniel

label: Shared Drive Lure
summary: Fake document-sharing alert with external reply path and suspicious file name.
subject: A document has been shared with you
body:
Dear user,

A confidential HR document has been shared with you. Open the attachment to review the file securely and confirm access before the share expires.

Open the attached form and verify now.

Regards,
Google Drive

label: Secure Archive Lure
summary: Password-protected archive lure using invoice language and staged delivery.
subject: Payment document enclosed
body:
Dear Customer,

Please review the attached payment archive immediately. The archive password will be provided after you confirm receipt. Extract the file and verify the remittance details today.

Regards,
Accounts Receivable

label: Delivery Exception
summary: Package-delivery phishing message with urgency and a shortened tracking link.
subject: Final notice: delivery failed today
body:
Dear Customer,

Your parcel could not be delivered today due to an address verification issue. Confirm delivery details immediately to avoid return to sender.

Track now:
https://bit.ly/parcel-failed-check

Delivery Desk

label: Vendor Invoice
summary: Legitimate vendor follow-up with normal billing context and no risky links.
subject: Updated invoice for March services
body:
Hi Lauger,

Attached is the updated invoice for March services. Let me know if you want us to resend the PDF through the client portal.

Thanks,
Mila

label: Internal IT Notice
summary: Legitimate internal notice about scheduled maintenance and MFA enrollment.
subject: Planned VPN maintenance on Friday
body:
Hi team,

We will perform scheduled VPN maintenance on Friday from 21:00 to 22:00 UTC. You may briefly lose access during the maintenance window. If you have not enrolled in MFA yet, please use the internal portal next week.

Thanks,
IT Operations

label: Brand Spoof Notice
summary: Trusted-brand display name delivered from an unrelated domain with reply redirection.
subject: Billing issue requires immediate review
body:
Dear Customer,

We detected a billing issue linked to your Amazon account. Review your payment details immediately to avoid service interruption.

Reply if you need assistance.

Amazon Billing
